title: Cite coverage per-layer type labels use singular i18n keys against plural schema/locales
description: Cite coverage per-layer type reporting uses the shared schema's plural KnowledgeType keys for per_layer_type, and the locale catalogs define only cite-coverage.contract.type.decisions/pitfalls/models/guidelines/processes/unresolved. The CLI formatter and integration tests instead construct or assert singular keys such as cite-coverage.contract.type.decision and pitfall. Missing locale entries can therefore render raw key strings while tests bless the fallback rather than the localized labels.
fix_direction: Align doctor cite-coverage formatter and tests with the plural KnowledgeType literals used by the shared schema and locale catalogs, or add an explicit mapping layer if display keys intentionally differ. Add regression coverage that fails on unresolved raw i18n keys for per-layer type output.

context.notes: Discovered by Round 8 dedup + issue creation worker DBP-20260609-040700

issue_history.note: Registered by Round 8 dedup + issue creation worker
